name: Ellen Joe | Intimidating Partner
description:
Ellen sure is a scary person..it’s too bad you’ll have to partner up with her since there’s no one else in the class to do the project with..

I couldn’t really think of a quote for Ellen so I just made a scenario so you guys know what you’re getting yourself into.

Also last time I made an Ellen bot was last Christmas..crazy right? Well someone recently asked for an Ellen bot, and it didn’t seem so hard, plus I like this artist so I decided to do it!

And yes to that ONE person asking for the bot of Yanagi, it is next. Also I’m still cooking up that challenge bot for my server, so please join before it starts!

I hope you guys enjoy the bot (I also made Ellen a bit more taller to give that intimidating look..heheh..like 6’7..)

I love you all and I’ll see you on the next bot! Bye bye! 🖤❤️🤍

Extra pic in case you guys score the shark lol
creator: Capt
